summary: Full frontend testing of Sonja's 16th birthday portal. All 9 feature flows tested and passing. App is fully functional.

issues: DATE field uses browser's native date picker (mm/dd/yyyy) instead of a styled date component. This is a minor design inconsistency with the dark neon aesthetic.

Tab buttons render both desktop and mobile label spans (e.g., button text reads 'ADVENTURESGO', 'YOUR GIFTGIFT'). On desktop the desktop label is visible and correct, but the hidden mobile span adds to text content - not a visual issue but a minor HTML concern.

critical_code_review_comments: NavHeader tab buttons contain both desktop (tab-label-desktop) and mobile (tab-label-mobile) label spans with CSS hiding one or the other. This is acceptable but the text selector picks both up - no visual bug.
seed_data_creation: Added 'Passport' packing item and 'Trip to Paris' adventure card via UI (localStorage - ephemeral)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 features fully working: password gate, 4-tab nav, YOU hero+city cards, YOUR GIFT boarding pass reveal+letter, THINGS YOU NEED packing list with localStorage persistence, ADVENTURES planner with localStorage, audio toggle button. Use data-testid='nav-tab-{id}' (id: you/gift/things/adventures) for tab navigation, data-testid='audio-toggle' for audio button.
